PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
React Native and full-stack developer with hands-on experience building cross-platform mobile apps and scalable web systems. Skilled in React Native, Android, Node.js, MongoDB, Firebase, and AWS, with additional experience in Three.js and interactive 3D development. Strong focus on production stability, modular architecture, and performance optimization.

CORE SKILLS
Languages: JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, Java, C, C++
Frontend: React, React Native, Next.js, Vite, Tailwind CSS
Backend: Node.js, Express, Django, Flask
Databases: MongoDB, Firebase Realtime Database, SQLite
Cloud and DevOps: AWS EC2, AWS S3, Docker, GitHub Actions, CI/CD
Realtime and Integrations: WebSockets, Push Notifications, Twilio, Google Gemini API

PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE
Tickets99 and EventTitans - React Native Developer
Hyderabad, India | Jun 2025 - Present
- Working on migration of a large Android application to React Native for Android and iOS.
- Maintaining and improving multi-screen production workflows for ticketing and event operations.
- Integrating backend APIs and improving app reliability, maintainability, and runtime performance.
- Collaborating with cross-functional teams to ship updates faster and reduce production issues.

SELECTED PROJECTS
MediVoice - Medicine Reminder and Assistance Platform
Tech Stack: React Native, Next.js, Node.js, MongoDB, AWS S3, Firebase, WebSockets, Twilio, Google Gemini
- Built a multi-role platform for patients, sellers, and doctors with real-time medicine workflows.
- Implemented reminders using local alarms, TTS voice alerts, and push notifications.
- Added missed-dose escalation with SMS and automated calls to guardians via Twilio.
- Integrated AI chat assistant with persistent history for user guidance.
- Set up CI/CD pipeline using GitHub Actions, Docker, and AWS EC2 deployment.

Time Table Generator
Tech Stack: Python, Django, SQLite
- Built a constraint-based timetable generation system for academic scheduling.
- Automated schedule creation and reduced manual planning effort significantly.
- Improved scheduling accuracy and reduced generation time from weeks to hours.

Student Communication Platform
Tech Stack: React, Firebase, Cloud Functions
- Built a real-time communication and announcement system for educational use.
- Supported concurrent users with stable messaging and notification workflows.
- Improved collaboration efficiency through centralized communication features.

Deep Crack - Image-Based Crack Detection System (B.Tech Project)
Tech Stack: Python, Flask, MobileNet, CNNs, SQLite, Data Augmentation
- Developed a crack detection workflow using transfer learning and data augmentation.
- Built a Flask interface for image upload and prediction visualization.
- Evaluated model performance with accuracy metrics and confusion matrix analysis.
